title: Finn and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Young Finn discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite it with its family through kindness and courage.

pages.text: Finn walked through the tall golden grass. The sun was getting low and orange. He heard a sad sound. "Waaahhh! Waaahhh!"

illustration.description: A small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through golden savanna grass in gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes and warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Finn walking through tall golden grass at sunset

pages.text: Behind a big rock, Finn found a tiny gray elephant. The baby elephant was crying. Its trunk wiggled sadly. "Are you lost?" asked Finn.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes kneeling next to a small gray baby elephant behind a large rock, painted in gouache style with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn discovering a crying baby elephant behind a rock

pages.text: The baby elephant nodded its big head. Tears rolled down its face. Finn patted the elephant gently. "Don't worry. I will help you find your family."

illustration.description: A gentle boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes patting a sad baby elephant, rendered in expressive gouache painting with thick painterly strokes and golden grass background
illustration.alt: Finn comforting the sad baby elephant

pages.text: Finn and the baby elephant walked together. They looked left. They looked right. Where could the elephant family be?

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking alongside a small gray elephant through savanna landscape, painted in gouache style with bold confident strokes and warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Finn and baby elephant walking together searching

pages.text: Then they heard trumpeting sounds! "PFFFRRRR! PFFFRRRR!" A big mama elephant was calling. The baby elephant got excited and flapped its ears.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes pointing toward a large mother elephant in the distance, with the baby elephant looking happy, painted in textured gouache with thick brushstrokes and golden grass
illustration.alt: Finn pointing toward mama elephant while baby elephant gets excited

pages.text: The baby elephant ran to its mama. The whole elephant family was so happy! They wrapped their trunks around each other. Finn smiled big. He had helped his new friend get home safe.

illustration.description: A happy boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watching a joyful elephant family reunion with trunks intertwined, painted in warm gouache style with expressive animals and bold confident strokes against orange sunset
illustration.alt: Finn watching the happy elephant family reunion

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound did Finn hear in the grass?
questions.explanation: Finn heard sad crying sounds from the lost baby elephant.

questions.question: What animal did Finn find?
questions.explanation: Finn found a lost baby elephant behind a big rock.

questions.question: How did Finn help the baby elephant?
questions.explanation: Finn helped the baby elephant find its way back to its family.

questions.question: How did the elephant family feel when they were reunited?
questions.explanation: The elephant family was very happy to be together again and wrapped their trunks around each other.
